title: The Borderlands
review: Note that this is not the notorious {Borderlands}. It's a low budget British found footage horror movie, that starts with some dodgily written characters at first, but I did grow to like their performances by the end. It's a Serviceable horror that I probably have more time for because it's British. I might not have liked it as much if it were American, but that's because I assume it would be a lot cheesier, and would come across as trying too hard.
